points: Developed a retrieval-augmented generation system for academic paper summarization using FAISS and Sentence Transformers
Preprocessed and analysed 12,000 research abstracts using Python and Pandas for downstream ML tasks
Built evaluation scripts to benchmark retrieval accuracy across chunking and embedding configurations

projects.name: AI Resume Tailor
projects.subtitle: Self-led
points: Built an AI-powered resume tailoring platform that parses JD PDFs using RegEx and Llama 3.2 locally
Implemented FAISS-based semantic matching to score JD-to-profile similarity
Designed a multi-user profile memory system with Streamlit and MySQL

projects.name: Sentiment Analysis Engine
projects.subtitle: Self-led
points: Built NLP sentiment classifier using TF-IDF vectorisation and logistic regression on 50,000 Amazon reviews
Handled class imbalance using SMOTE achieving 89 percent accuracy on test set

achievements.title: Top 5 percent on Kaggle Tabular Playground Series
achievements.description: Ranked in top 5 percent out of 3,200 teams using gradient boosting

achievements.title: Winner - Inter-NIT ML Hackathon
achievements.description: Built real-time fraud detection system, ranked 1st among 85 teams
